top_signals.title: Oil Holds Decline as Traders Weigh Trump’s Latest Iran Threats
top_signals.summary: Oil held a modest decline, as traders shrugged off President Donald Trump’s newest threat to resume strikes on Iran, a pledge the US leader has made repeatedly before backing off since a truce was agreed to in early April.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
